validators.notes: Verified project name and mission created local MDE starter artifacts.
Validated Worker routes, OpenSearch query generation, explain contract, metric math, and no-runtime-LLM rule.
Validated project-local MDE JSON and JSONL artifacts remain parseable.
Validated evaluation artifact shape and metric calculations, but does not replace live OpenSearch Cranfield evaluation.
Proved Workers write scope, secret upload, deployment, workers.dev route, and deployed version creation.
Verified public health, search, explain, latest, and versioned endpoints against live OpenSearch results.
Verified the Worker root serves a search interface with indexed-data details and example queries.
Verified metadata endpoints expose Cranfield document counts, qrel counts, searchable fields, topic hints, and example queries.
The browser plugin reported no available browser instances, so visual inspection was limited to served HTML structure and public HTTP contract checks.
Verified the explain API returns a retrievalFlow sequence that matches the public flow diagram.
Verified the deployed root UI contains the flow diagram and public explain endpoints include retrievalFlow for live queries.
Verified the public evaluation endpoint exposes aggregate metrics and representative strong, mixed, and weak examples.
Verified the deployed root UI includes the evaluation section and live search/explain still work after the evaluation addition.
Verified the root page is a phase overview and Phase 1 content is split into focused overview, search, data, explain, and evaluation routes.
Verified deployed home, Phase 1 subpages, /phase-1 aliases, planned phase pages, search API, explain API, and evaluation API against the public Worker.
Verified local Worker HTML includes dataset references on the home page, Cranfield data page, and BEIR planned page, and that /api/cranfield/meta exposes the Cranfield source URL.
Verified deployed pages include Cranfield, BEIR, ESCI, and behavior-source status references, while live search still returns the expected top Cranfield result.
Verified .mde/traceability.json, timeline docs, canonical IDs, and endpoint manifest contain the Phase 1 chain M-0001, A-0002, SE-0001, ARCH-0.1, ADL-0001, and v0.1.0.
Verified local /api/v0.1/search aliases route to the Cranfield baseline and API payloads include traceability identifiers.
Grouped 225 live Cranfield queries into behavior classes and exposed relevant IDs, retrieved IDs, first relevant rank, and missing relevant IDs for each detailed run.
Compared baseline, query-rescue, and field-sum live artifacts; rejected query-rescue and kept field-sum as a transferability-pending candidate based on measured deltas.
Compared coverage-rerank against the accepted baseline and field-sum; verified nDCG@10 0.3095 and improved all core live Cranfield metrics while keeping the public default unchanged.
Generated a reusable live OpenSearch field-sum top-50 retrieval cache for 225 Cranfield queries so reranker tuning can avoid repeated remote retrieval calls.
Verified offline PRF tuning from cached pools reproduces the refined PRF nDCG@10 0.3260 result before any future remote validation.
Verified the embedding cache shape for 1,400 Cranfield documents and 225 queries. The local-hash provider is only a deterministic control, not an LLM embedding validator.
Compared vector-only and hybrid retrieval against cached field-sum pools; showed local vector-control evidence remains below refined PRF and should not be promoted.
Verified local Ollama can generate restartable real embedding caches for all 1,400 Cranfield documents and 225 queries with provider, model, host, dimension, and text-profile metadata.
Compared Ollama llama3.1:8b vector-only and hybrid retrieval against cached field-sum pools and refined PRF; showed best Ollama nDCG@10 0.3035 and binary nDCG@20 0.4343 remain below refined PRF.
Verified LTR token filtering, feature extraction, learned reranking behavior, query-fold cross-validation, and candidate-pool recall calculations.
Compared LTR with Ollama features and lexical/PRF-only ablations using query-grouped 5-fold cross-validation; showed LTR improves field-sum but remains below refined PRF.
Measured candidate-pool recall and oracle metrics, showing top-50 ranking headroom is large while a smaller recall gap remains.

Compared quick and depth-3 pointwise boosted-tree LTR under query-grouped cross-validation; showed graded CV improved to 0.3216 but remained below refined PRF, while binary CV regressed versus lexical LTR.
Verified local SentenceTransformers BGE embedding generation for all Cranfield documents and queries with provider, model, dimension, text-profile, and query-prefix metadata.
Compared BGE vector-only and hybrid retrieval against cached field-sum pools and refined PRF; showed best BGE hybrid nDCG@10 0.3533 and binary nDCG@20 0.4915.
Compared coordinate and boosted-tree LTR with BGE features under query-grouped cross-validation; showed boosted-tree graded nDCG@10 0.3603 and binary nDCG@20 0.4910.
Created a separate remote OpenSearch kNN index with 1,400 Cranfield documents and 768-dimensional BGE vectors without changing the public/default cranfield-v0 index.
Compared remote OpenSearch BGE vector-only, field-sum, and hybrid retrieval; showed best remote hybrid nDCG@10 0.3533 and binary nDCG@20 0.4926.
Verified milestone search and explain routes force the intended architecture for ARCH-0.1 and ARCH-0.2 PRF, expose an explicit ARCH-0.3 BGE runtime limitation, and reject unknown milestones.
